scripts.dev:browser: pnpm --filter @open-agent-browser/shared build && pnpm --filter @open-agent-browser/extension build && pnpm --filter @open-agent-browser/browser launch:dev
scripts.lint: pnpm --filter @open-agent-browser/shared build && pnpm -r --if-present lint && pnpm clean-room:check && pnpm license:check
scripts.smoke:e2e: pnpm --filter @open-agent-browser/shared build && pnpm --filter @open-agent-browser/extension build && tsx scripts/smoke-extension-e2e.ts
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @open-agent-browser/shared build && pnpm -r --if-present test && node node_modules/vitest/vitest.mjs run --dir scripts
